emotional_tone: Scientific, deterministic, highly optimized, elite performance, command-center precision.

rules.anti_default: Banned: Inter, Roboto, Space Grotesk. Used: Cabinet Grotesk (Headings), IBM Plex Sans (Body).
rules.letter_spacing: Headlines > 32px MUST use tracking-tight or tracking-tighter.

headings.usage: H1 (text-5xl lg:text-6xl), H2 (text-3xl lg:text-4xl), H3 (text-xl sm:text-2xl)

body.usage: Base body copy, paragraphs, form labels (text-sm to text-base).

mono.usage: Code snippets, token metrics, $ saved counters, request IDs.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento Grid (Tetris Mode for Marketing, Control Room Mode for Dashboard)
layout_and_spacing.container_padding: Generous spacing philosophy (p-8, p-12, p-16) for marketing. Dense spacing (p-4, p-6) for dashboard.
layout_and_spacing.borders_and_radii: Sharp, technical edges. rounded-none or max rounded-md (6px) to maintain a brutalist/precise tech feel. No large pill shapes.

surfaces.dashboard_cards: Grid Borders: Expose the skeleton. border-collapse style with 1px solid borders.
surfaces.headers: Crystal Glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0A0A]/70 with a delicate 1px inner border-white/10.

marketing.structure: HTML/Tailwind (sections, divs) for maximum asymmetry and artistic control. Do NOT use Shadcn Card for landing page layouts.
marketing.hero: Max overlay bg-black/40. Never completely cover the abstract background.
marketing.animations: Subtle 1px tracing beam on pricing cards. Framer Motion for scroll reveals.

dashboard.structure: Shadcn UI heavily customized to match the brand colors and sharp border radii.
dashboard.tables: Shadcn Table with IBM Plex Mono for data cells. High contrast on hover.
dashboard.charts: Recharts (Shadcn Chart). Use primary (#FF4500) for usage, and status.success (#00E676) for Tokens Saved / ROI.
dashboard.inputs: Shadcn Input, Select, Switch, Dialog. focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FF4500] focus:border-[#FF4500].

icons.usage: Stroke width 1.5, technical, sharp. Use Phosphor Icons if dense metrics require it.

landing_page.hero: Headline: 'Distill Prompts. Slash LLM Costs by 80%.' Waitlist capture and dynamic token savings calculator. Abstract orange data stream background.
landing_page.features: Bento grid explaining the 5 distillation pillars (lexical compression, semantic cache, etc).
landing_page.pricing: High-contrast tiers. 'Tracing Beam' active border on the Pro/Enterprise tier.
landing_page.social_proof: Subtle enterprise logos in a slow marquee, off-white opacity-50.

playground.layout: Split-pane view. Left: Raw Prompt input. Right: Distilled output (read-only). Show real-time token diff and visual compression effect.

dashboard_overview.metrics: Top row Control Room Grid: Real-time Tokens Saved, $ Saved Counter, Active Keys.
dashboard_overview.charts: Savings over time Rechart (Matrix Green line).
dashboard_overview.logs: Request logs table with timestamp, endpoint, original tokens, compressed tokens, % saved.

documentation.layout: Sidebar nav, wide content area. Copy-paste code blocks in IBM Plex Mono. 'Copy to clipboard' tooltips.

images.description: Abstract visualization of data compression, glowing orange streams condensing, pure black void.
Subtle dark grid noise texture, carbon fiber/micro-chip feel for dashboard background.
Dark server data center. Use for 'Multi-tier routing' or 'Infrastructure' bento card.

logos.description: Enterprise partner/customer placeholder references. Use plain text or vector icons (e.g., using lucide or simple svgs) in the UI to represent company logos if actual images aren't available, but avoid standard dummyimage URLs. Keep opacity low (40-50%).

instructions_to_main_agent.1: Use pure HTML + Tailwind for marketing section layouts to achieve bento grids and overlaps. Use Shadcn components for complex interactions, forms, and the entire Dashboard.
instructions_to_main_agent.2: Apply 'data-testid' to ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, forms, chart containers). e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='api-key-copy'.
instructions_to_main_agent.3: Load the specified Google Fonts (Cabinet Grotesk, IBM Plex Sans, IBM Plex Mono) dynamically in the index.html or layout wrapper.
instructions_to_main_agent.4: Dashboard must feel dense, data-rich, and technical ('Control Room' layout). Prioritize 1px borders and avoid soft shadows.
instructions_to_main_agent.5: Do NOT use placeholder image URLs like via.placeholder.com. Use ONLY the media URLs provided in this file.
instructions_to_main_agent.6: Implement a real-time 'Tokens Saved' counter effect on the marketing page to build immediate value trust.
instructions_to_main_agent.7: Do not center-align everything. Use asymmetry to create visual tension and hierarchy.
instructions_to_main_agent.8: The design theme is explicitly Dark. Do not implement a light mode toggle unless required by the spec. Hardcode dark theme classes or force 'dark' on the html tag.
